scenarios.title: Image Generation and LoRA Training Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Stable Diffusion or Diffusers-style image generation servers, node workflow graphs, image generation model managers, LoRA/model utilities, and local generation app operations.
scenarios.role: Use `invokeai` for InvokeAI-specific server configuration, node workflows, workflow queues, and model-management diagnostics.
scenarios.read_when: The user mentions InvokeAI, invokeai-web, InvokeAI workflow JSON, custom invocations/nodes, session queue, model manager, LoRA/GGUF in InvokeAI, or InvokeAI auth/user CLI.
scenarios.best_for: Configuring/routing InvokeAI server and API behavior, authoring/debugging InvokeAI nodes, validating workflow/queue payloads, and safely triaging model records/formats without full generation runs.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use Diffusers for raw Python pipeline APIs, ComfyUI for ComfyUI graph/node workflows, and sd-scripts for LoRA training scripts not involving InvokeAI.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose InvokeAI when the task centers on InvokeAI's application server, API/services, node workflow runtime, session queue/library records, or model manager; choose adjacent skills only when the request is about a different package's standalone APIs.
